payload.title: Hub API: workspace becomes the ticket scope
payload.description: Update endpoints: GET /api/workspaces returns workspaces with key/name/description/overview. GET /api/tickets?workspace=<id> filters by workspace_id. POST /api/tickets accepts workspace, generates ticket ID from workspace.key. GET /api/projects returns synthesized list of one project per workspace for old-client compat. SSE events still include workspace field.
